name: What happens if I win against Perplexity? Do they pay right away?

mainEntity.name: What happens if I win against Perplexity? Do they pay right away?

acceptedAnswer.description: Winners get injunctions, damages/profits; Perplexity may appeal, delaying payment years.[4] NYT seeks millions; settlements common in AI suits.[2][5] Key factors: Willful = triple damages; class actions possible. Post-judgment collection via assets. NY jurisdiction aids enforcement.[1] Monitor case dockets. Victories reshape AI content use.
